stance_system.title: Understanding the Stance System
stance_system.description: Master the rock-paper-scissors combat system for optimal damage

details.power_beats_technical: Power attacks break through Technical defenses and deal massive damage
details.technical_beats_speed: Technical attacks counter Speed rushes with precise timing
details.speed_beats_power: Speed attacks interrupt Power wind-ups before they can execute
details.same_type_clash: Matching attack types result in clashes with reduced damage

advanced_tips: Watch for stance tells - monsters telegraph their next attack type
Some monsters change preferred stance when enraged or in different phases
Kinship attacks ignore the stance system and always deal full damage
Breaking parts can sometimes disrupt a monster's preferred stance patterns

kinship_system.title: Kinship Attack Mastery
kinship_system.description: Build and utilize kinship energy for devastating special attacks

mechanics.building_kinship: Land successful attacks, especially when winning stance battles
mechanics.kinship_levels: Three levels of kinship provide increasingly powerful attacks
mechanics.timing: Perfect timing windows increase kinship gain and damage output
mechanics.monster_specific: Each monster has unique kinship animations and effects

optimization_tips: Save kinship attacks for critical moments or boss phases
Some kinship attacks provide beneficial effects beyond just damage
Kinship attacks can break parts more effectively than normal attacks
Use kinship attacks to interrupt dangerous enemy moves

elemental_effectiveness.title: Elemental Damage Systems
elemental_effectiveness.description: Maximize damage through elemental advantage understanding
advanced_mechanics: Some monsters have dual typing affecting elemental calculations
Elemental damage increases with attack level and proper gene combinations
Status effects can be enhanced by matching elemental weaknesses
Certain parts may have different elemental weaknesses than the main body

s_tier.reasoning: Game-breaking power levels, ultimate utility, or unique mechanics

a_tier.reasoning: Excellent stats, reliable performance, strong in most situations

b_tier.reasoning: Good performance, solid choices with specific strengths

c_tier.reasoning: Decent early-game options, outclassed by higher tiers later

meta_shifts.current_meta: Balanced teams with elemental coverage dominate
trending_strategies: Elemental specialist teams for specific encounters
Kinship spam strategies for burst damage
meta_shifts.predicted_changes: Future updates may adjust elemental effectiveness and kinship generation rates

gene_inheritance.title: Understanding Gene Systems
gene_inheritance.description: Master gene inheritance for optimal monster builds

gene_types.active_genes: Provide new attacks and abilities when activated
gene_types.passive_genes: Always active, provide stat bonuses and special effects
gene_types.rare_genes: Unique genes with powerful effects, harder to obtain

inheritance_rules: Genes transfer based on compatibility between monster species
Higher rarity monsters have better gene pools
Some genes are species-locked and cannot transfer
Gene levels can be improved through repeated breeding

power_build.recommended_parents: High attack stat monsters with compatible genes

elemental_build.recommended_parents: Strong elemental monsters of matching types

rare_gene_locations.legendary_genes: Found only on Elder Dragons and special event monsters
rare_gene_locations.elemental_mastery: Obtained from monsters with pure elemental typing
rare_gene_locations.kinship_genes: Enhance kinship attack power and generation rate

boss_preparation.title: Boss Battle Preparation
research_phase: Study boss attack patterns and stance preferences
Note any phase changes or special mechanics
Plan team composition around boss weaknesses
equipment_prep: Stock up on healing items and buffs
Equip gear that resists boss's primary element
Bring items that exploit boss weaknesses

efficiency_optimization.title: Grinding and Farming Efficiency
efficiency_optimization.description: Maximize time investment through optimized farming
experience_farming: Target high-EXP enemies in late-game areas
Use EXP-boosting items during grinding sessions
Focus on monsters weak to your team's elements
material_farming: Research which monsters drop needed materials
Use specific attacks to target breakable parts
Bring monsters that increase drop rates
Plan routes to hit multiple targets efficiently

competitive_strategies.title: PvP and Challenge Mode Tactics

team_archetypes.rush_down: Fast, aggressive teams that overwhelm before opponents can set up
team_archetypes.control: Defensive teams that counter opponent moves and win through attrition
team_archetypes.combo: Teams built around specific monster interactions for devastating combos

mind_games: Vary your attack patterns to keep opponents guessing
Save powerful kinship attacks for psychological pressure
Use status effects to disrupt opponent timing
Adapt your strategy based on opponent's team composition

post_game_challenges.elder_dragon_gauntlet: Face multiple Elder Dragons in succession
post_game_challenges.deviant_hunts: Enhanced versions of regular monsters with unique mechanics
post_game_challenges.survival_trials: Long battles testing resource management and endurance
post_game_challenges.perfect_run_challenges: Complete battles without taking damage or using items

ultimate_builds.god_tier_monsters: Fully optimized monsters with perfect gene combinations
ultimate_builds.rainbow_teams: Teams covering all elements with perfect synergy
ultimate_builds.challenge_builds: Specialized builds for specific endgame challenges
